svg.text: 10 Cas de Test pour Diagnostic IA (Format Formulaire)

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; justify-content: center;
background: white; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding: 20px; width: 48%; box-sizing: border-box; border-left: 5px solid #3498db; margin-bottom: 20px;

h3.style: color: #2c3e50; margin-top: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #ecf0f1; padding-bottom: 10px; font-size: 18px;

div.style: font-size: 13px; background: #fdf2e9; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; min-height: 120px; max-height: 180px; overflow-y: auto; line-height: 1.4;

ul.style: font-size: 13px; margin: 0; padding-left: 20px; background: #e8f8f5; padding: 10px 10px 10px 25px; border-radius: 4px; min-height: 120px; max-height: 180px; overflow-y: auto; line-height: 1.4;
